title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 13 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 13 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 13 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/03/2025
Today, DCE iron ore fluctuated repeatedly. The most-traded I2505 contract finally closed at 780 yuan/mt, up 0.45% for the day.Traders sold goods based on market trends, while steel mills purchased as needed, with slightly increased inquiries. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
